title: elatine hydropiper subsp. orthosperma
intro: Elatine hydropiper subsp. orthosperma, also known as water wort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Elatinaceae family. Traditionally, water wort has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Water wort can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
